author: Sangharakshita
title: Contents of Art - Women-s Order Convention 1987
content:
SANGHARAKSHITA IN SEMINAR

[WOMEN'S ORDER CONVENTION 1987]
QUESTIONS ON ART AND THE ORDER
Contents
1The type of image/rupa appropriate for a public shrine room
(The individual, general and universal in art)
4Artists being a part of their contemporary culture and in harmony with their
age?
6Artists (such as Blake) being in a minority
11Is greater art produced from isolation?
12Is there such a thing as an 'artistic temperament'?
16Vidyadharas and art
17Realising one's talent/genius
19The idea of starting an arts centre in London
23Can a real work of art be negative?
28Discriminative appreciation
30Francis Bacon - the contemporary artist
33The myth of the unappreciated artist
